value: v1.12.1 shipped 2026-04-16 (#74 auto-backup project scope, #75 encrypted roundtrip). v1.12.2 code-complete on same day — consolidated export/import integrity patch covering #78 (export envelope), #76 (single-file export-all), #77 (transactional multi-section imports via new saveAll), #79 (non-string leaf rejection), #80 (import_max_bytes size cap, default 50 MB). Five issues, four commits. 1269 tests pass. Commits 481f0ff / e726f65 / ff22307 / 0f02457 unpushed; release bump (1.12.1 → 1.12.2) pending. v1.12.x export/import integrity chain is then done.
